channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The IRS is rolling out its free tax-filing tool to 30 million Americans—and surprisingly, it’s great
item.description: Some 30 million Americans across the country will have a new way to file their taxes next spring: Direct File, a tool developed by the Internal Revenue Service that allows users to prepare their taxes and file online completely free of charge and without the need for any third-party provider.
item.dc:creator: Bryce Covert, Fast Company

item.title: Climate change gave significant boost to Milton's destructive rain, winds, scientists say
item.description: Scientists say human-caused climate change intensified deadly Hurricane Milton’s rainfall by 20 to 30% and strengthened its winds by about 10%.
item.dc:creator: Alexa St. John, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Pentagon releases final CMMC rule, paving way for implementation
item.description: The Pentagon has taken another big step forward to make CMMC a reality. DoD projects the requirements will start showing up in contracts by mid-2025. The post Pentagon releases final CMMC rule, paving way for implementation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: More than one-third of cloud environments are critically exposed, says Tenable
item.description: In the first half of this year, 38% of organizations had at least one cloud workload that was critically vulnerable, highly privileged, and publicly exposed, according to a study of telemetry from customers of cloud security vendor Tenable released this week.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: North Carolina maker of high-purity quartz back operating post-Helene
item.description: SPRUCE PINE, N.C. (AP) — One of the two companies that manufacture high-purity quartz used for making semiconductors and other high-tech products from mines in a western North Carolina community severely damaged by Hurricane Helene is operating again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Protecting Your Digital Life: Steps to Take if Your Phone is Stolen or Lost
item.description: Learn how to protect your digital life and what steps to take if your phone is stolen or lost, including basic protections, newer features, tracking your device, and final steps to take.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Microsoft unveils health care AI tools
item.description: Microsoft unveiled several new artificial intelligence (AI) tools on Thursday aiming to support health care organizations through medical imaging models, health care agent services and an AI-driven workflow solution for nurses.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Scully, The Hill

item.title: Trial for Four Co-Defendants Postponed Due to Judge's Ruling on Separate Trials - Santa Cruz County
item.description: Santa Cruz murder trial delayed as judge rules four co-defendants will have separate trials, citing potential juror bias and difficulty in untangling transcript redactions.
item.dc:creator: Jessica York, The Mercury News

item.title: Here’s what’s new in Office 2024
item.description: Microsoft has just released Office 2024, the new non-subscription version of its office suite. It’s available in three editions: Office Home 2024 for consumers, Office Home & Business 2024 for consumers and small businesses, and Office LTSC 2024 for midsize and large businesses.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta expands AI assistant to more countries and languages amid intensifying AI battle
item.description: Meta announced plans to roll out its AI-powered chatbot, Meta AI, in 21 new markets, intensifying its competition with OpenAI’s ChatGPT and Google’s Gemini.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: CISO의 새로운 무기 ‘리스크 스토리텔링’ 역량 개발법
item.description: 리스크 스토리텔링 능력은 조직 내 실질적 변화를 이끄는 핵심 요소다. 효과적인 스토리는 사이버 보안 리스크를 부각해 주의를 환기시키고, 최종적으로 구체적 행동을 유도한다. 칼라일그룹(Carlyle Group)의 CISO 베서니 드 루드는 “무엇이든 대화의 주제가 되면 우선순위로 올라가게 마련이다. 그래서 우리는 사이버 보안에 대해 대화해야 한다”라고 설명했다. 드 루드가 말하는 것은 단순한 기술적 통제에 관한 낡은 이야기가 아니다.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Amazon’s new AI-powered spotlight tech aims to help delivery drivers find packages faster
item.description: Amazon, in its quest for greater efficiency, has developed new systems to shave seconds off each package delivery and to help customers make faster buying choices, even for new product types that they may know little about.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk unveils Tesla's 'Cybercab,' plans to bring autonomous driving tech to other models in 2025
item.description: Tesla unveiled its long-awaited robotaxi at a Hollywood studio Thursday night, though fans of the electric vehicle maker will have to wait until at least 2026 before they are available.
item.dc:creator: Tom Krisher, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The big question mark at the center of Tesla’s self-driving Robotaxi
item.description: Tesla’s unveiling of its Robotaxi tomorrow should finally offer us a better look at CEO Elon Musk’s next big project. But it’s likely we won’t come away knowing much—or not enough—about the technology underpinning the self-driving system.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Effective EDR: Balancing testing rigor and velocity
item.description: Various industries are still dealing with the consequences of the July 2024 technology outage which led to a "blue screen of death" and extreme disruptions. The post Effective EDR: Balancing testing rigor and velocity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Gemini Code Assist Enterprise woos enterprise developers
item.description: Google Cloud has announced Gemini Code Assist Enterprise, billed as an enterprise-grade tool that lets developers generate or transform code that is more accurate and relevant to their applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Big Tech’s experimental AI can’t beat old-school productivity gems
item.description: The “Chat” in ChatGPT’s name neatly encapsulates a major element of why OpenAI’s AI-infused assistant has had such epoch-shifting impact. We’ve been using PCs and phones to chat with humans for years—at least since the era of AOL Instant Messenger.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: Volunteers at Concordia Cemetery use technology to unearth Buffalo history
item.description: "We're going to be looking for and bringing up some of the tombstones that have sunk or have been buried," said Bonnie Fleischauer, Concordia Cemetery's public information officer.
item.dc:creator: Kayleigh Hunter-Gasperini, NewsNation

item.title: How to use your iPhone to get help by satellite
item.description: Apple’s decision to put satellite connections in iPhones is already saving lives, and as Hurricane Milton threatens Florida, now is the time for every US iPhone user to learn how the system works and why they should upgrade to iOS 18.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Ransomware attack impacts 237,000 Comcast customers
item.description: Debt agency breach exposes 237,700 Comcast customers' personal data. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson explains what happened and provides six tips to help protect yourself from such a breach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Toyota to invest additional $500 million in Bay Area-based electric aircraft maker Joby Aviation
item.description: The aviation company has designed and produced an electric air taxi that will carry a pilot and four passengers at speeds up to 200 mph offering high-speed mobility with a fraction of the noise produced by helicopters and zero operating emissions.
item.dc:creator: James Herrera, The Mercury News

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Federal prosecutors eye asking judge to break up Google
item.description: The Department of Justice (DOJ) is considering asking a federal judge to order Google to break off its search business from other portions of the company to address its illegal monopoly over online search.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: US considers asking court to break up Google as it weighs remedies in the antitrust case
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is considering asking a federal judge to break up Google after its ubiquitous search engine was declared an illegal monopoly, but it is just one of many possible remedies under review, according to a court filing.
item.dc:creator: SHAWN CHEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Linus Torvalds annoyed by passive language in commit messages
item.description: The latest release candidate of Linux 6.12 was announced over the weekend, promoting some comments about grammar from Linux founder Linus Torvalds.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: iPhone update allows users to text for help when there's no cell service. How it works
item.description: With Hurricane Milton barreling toward Florida's Gulf Coast, many Tampa Bay area residents are fearing widespread and potentially weeks-long power outages, which could affect cellphone service, as many saw during Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, The Hill

item.title: Someone reinvented the toilet so that you can do your business anywhere
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals how the Generation 2 Reinvented Toilet transforms waste into safe materials, a promising sanitation solution that could transform lives and communities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Electron vs. Tauri: Which cross-platform framework is for you?
item.description: If there’s one thing developers agree on about cross-platform applications, it’s that it’s easier to create a GUI with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript than to use one of the many cross-platform frameworks out there. Frameworks like Electron give you the best of both worlds.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft 365: A guide to the updates
item.description: Microsoft 365 (and Office 365) subscribers get more frequent software updates than those who have purchased Office without a subscription, which means subscribers have access to the latest features, security patches, and bug fixes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Red Sea cable cuts disrupted up to 70% of traffic, says RETN
item.description: Independent global network services provider RETN says its network diagnostics show that the February 2024 cable cuts in the Red Sea, initially reported to have affected 25% of data traffic between Europe and Asia, caused far more disruption than originally estimated.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The best new features and fixes in Python 3.13
item.description: Python 3.13 has just been released. This article presents a rundown of the most significant new features in Python 3.13 and what they mean for Python developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Many loathe public speakerphone calls, so why do people do it?
item.description: The fact that it's a phone conversation — not just in-person chit-chat — could be part of the reason people find loud speakerphone calls so grating, speculated Ozlem Ayduk.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: 'Fargo' creator: 'We've got a fight on our hands'
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What to stream: Coldplay, an unhinged Charlie Puth, 'Salem’s Lot,' Sarah Paulson and NHL 25
item.description: Coldplay's 10th studio album and the American Music Awards celebrating their 50th anniversary are some of the new television, films, music and games headed to a device near you.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Fiscal Service using death data to reduce improper payments
item.description: Tim Gribben, the commissioner of the Bureau of the Fiscal Service, said the bureau refined and reframed its progress statement for the first time since 2018. The post Fiscal Service using death data to reduce improper payments first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Civilization 7 makers work with Shawnee to bring sincere representation of the tribe to the game
item.description: MIAMI, Okla. (AP) — Shawnee Tribe Chief Ben Barnes grew up playing video games, including “probably hundreds of hours” colonizing a distant planet in the 1999 title Sid Meier's Alpha Centauri.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM LEE BREWER and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5
